description: Outcome-based persistent memory for AI coding tools (Claude Code, OpenCode)
release_notes: v0.5.5.1: Hotfix for two GitHub-reported bugs in v0.5.5. Issue #10 (Critical): OpenCode Desktop ignored project-specific ROAMPAL_PROFILE; switching projects in the Desktop UI didn't apply the project-specific profile because the singleton plugin's process.cwd() and process.env are frozen at workspace launch. Fixed by reading the active session's directory via client.session.get on every chat.message; the session reflects the user's actually-active project even when the plugin is workspace-scoped. Verified end-to-end on Desktop 1.14.29 with two test projects flipping between profile=test-a and profile=test-b. Issue #11: roampal init --force now actually replaces the OpenCode plugin file on Windows. The --force flag was previously ignored for the plugin path, and shutil.copy errors (e.g. file lock from running Desktop) had no error handling. Both fixes are plugin/CLI only, no server-side changes.
